allow: PowerShell(Get-Process docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, CPU | Format-Table; Write-Output "---"; \(Get-Item docker-build.err.log\).LastWriteTime; Write-Output "now: $\(Get-Date\)")
PowerShell(\(Get-Item docker-build.err.log\).LastWriteTime; Get-Date; Write-Output "---last 5 lines of err log---"; Get-Content docker-build.err.log -Tail 5)

PowerShell(try { $html = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8080/super" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).Content; Write-Output "GET /super OK"; Write-Output "---tabs still in HTML---"; \($html -split "`n"\) | Select-String -Pattern 'data-bs-target="#' | Select-Object -First 15 } catch { "ERROR: $_" })
